data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding selector types.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement concerning 'Selector types (specific record, credential type, fact requirement)'. However, the evidence provided does not include any details about the selector types or their linkage to the credential request object for the 'Weekend on-site technician' task. This lack of critical information leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction is absent.
gaps: No evidence of selector types related to the credential request object.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for selector types.
